chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-868 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Arbab Ali Hakro Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Safdar Ali Shah, DEO, ES&HS, Sukkur and Imdad Ali, Focal Person for Director, ES&HS, Sukkur. Date of Hearing & Order: 19-03-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J.,- Learned AAG submits that entire process of the petitioner’s appointment has been completed, but because of an stay order granted by this Court in Suits No.1493 & 1322 of 2023, passed by a Single Bench of this Court at Karachi, the offer order is not being issued to the petitioner. We have reminded him that we are exercising constitutional jurisdiction which has got precedence over any other jurisdiction including jurisdiction exercised under Civil Procedure Code by a Single Bench of this Court. We have already observed that petitioner’s case on merit on the basis of ‘Deceased Quota’ has already been approved. The order passed by a Single Bench of this Court in some Suits shall not be considered to mount any impediment to issuance of offer order to him. Therefore, notwithstanding any order passed by any Court except the Supreme Court or a Divisional Bench of this Court staying the process of petitioner’s case while exercising jurisdiction under the Constitution, the petitioner shall be given offer order as per recommendations of the C.P No.D-868 of 2023 2 relevant committee and undertaken by learned AAG, within a period of 15 days under compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar for a perusal in chamber.

The order passed by a Single Bench of this Court in some Suits shall not be considered to mount any impediment to issuance of offer order to him. Therefore, notwithstanding any order passed by any Court except the Supreme Court or a Divisional Bench of this Court staying the process of petitioner’s case while exercising jurisdiction under the Constitution, the petitioner shall be given offer order as per recommendations of the C.P No.D-868 of 2023 2 relevant committee and undertaken by learned AAG, within a period of 15 days under compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar for a perusal in chamber. The petition is disposed of in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
